zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Crawford於大約1208年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親Reginald de Crawford44歲，母親Margaret Loudoun40歲。她於1235年之前與David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1250年在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾莫丁頓享年43歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Crawford于大约1208年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲Reginald de Crawford44岁，母亲Margaret Loudoun40岁。她于1235年之前与David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1250年在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾莫丁頓享年43岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Crawford was born about 1208, in Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Reginald de Crawford, was 44 and her mother, Margaret Loudoun, was 40. She married David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville before 1235, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1250, in Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Crawford est née environ 1208, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Reginald de Crawford, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Loudoun, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville avant 1235, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1250, à Mordington, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Crawford um 1208 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald de Crawford 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret Loudoun 40. Sie hat vor 1235 in Scotland David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1250 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Mordington, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Crawford è nata il circa 1208 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Reginald de Crawford, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaret Loudoun, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville prima del 1235, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1250, nel Mordington, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Crawfordが約1208年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Reginald de Crawfordは44歳，母Margaret Loudounは40歳であった。1235年以前にスコットランドでDavid de Lindsay Lord of Brenevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1250年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアモーディントンで43歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Crawford(이)가 대략 1208년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald de Crawford(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Loudoun(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1235년 이전 스컷랜드에서 David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 모르딩턴에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland: Mordington, Berrick, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Crawford nasceu aproximadamente 1208, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Reginald de Crawford, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Loudoun, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville antes 1235, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1250, em Mordington, Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Crawford родилась около 1208 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Reginald de Crawford было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Loudoun, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville перед 1235 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1250 г. в местности мордингтон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Crawford nació aproximadamente 1208, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Reginald de Crawford, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Loudoun, tenía 40 años. Se casó con David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville antes de 1235, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1250, en Mordington, Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
